description: A dark, somber self-portrait showing a man's face reflected in a large gold-framed mirror. The figure is rendered in muted, ghostly tones — pale face emerging from a dark suit and darker background. The reflection appears slightly distorted and haunting. Ornamental objects including what appears to a clock are visible on a mantelpiece below the mirror. The overall palette is almost monochromatic in browns, golds, and dark greens, creating a deeply atmospheric, introspective mood.
